---
title: "Sharing & Versioning"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Creator-Copyright.html"
  text: "Licensing Your OER"

next:
  href: "Creator-Adapting, Revising, and Remixing.html"
  text: "Adapting, Revising, and Remixing"
---

To ensure your OER lives beyond your immediate project:

### Share

-   Institutional repositories.

-   GitHub Pages.

-   OER Commons.

### Provide clear attribution information

Include:

-   title;
-   authors;
-   licence;
-   version;
-   date created/updated.

### Use version control

Tools like GitHub facilitate:

-   transparent updates;
-   change logs;
-   issues and contributions.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Creator-Adapting,%20Revising,%20and%20Remixing.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Adapting,%20Revising,%20and%20Remixing.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
